notes: Validation export, label-sheet, merge, frame evaluation, clinical-scale agreement evaluation, threshold calibration, and model-readiness report tooling are implemented.
No clinician-reviewed validation dataset is committed in this repository.

House-Brackmann-inspired, Sunnybrook-style, and eFACE-style outputs are Mirror self-tracking estimates only. They are not clinician-assigned grades, diagnosis, prognosis, treatment guidance, or claims of clinical accuracy.
Primary clinical-scale target assignment should use the blinded label sheet workflow in docs/clinical-scale-review-protocol.md.

Future optional clinical validation review would require current v5 estimates with at least 60% usable movement coverage, complete scale-specific input provenance for counted primary-scale comparisons, complete resting-metric provenance, no inferred House-Brackmann eye-closure input, pseudonymous reviewer identity controls, at least 10 distinct pseudonymous validation cases, the documented 80% observed agreement, 80% Wilson lower-bound agreement, House-Brackmann case-mix standard, a passed clinical review package verification report listed in clinicalScaleReviewPackageVerificationReports, explicit source-dataset hash lists for agreement, reviewer-agreement, and package-verification evidence, and matching per-scale sourceDatasetSha256/review-package paths. This repository currently keeps clinicalFacingScoresAllowed false.

Production threshold constants should not be changed from schema-v1 calibration reports until reviewed datasets are available, and calibrated status must list thresholdCalibrationSourceDatasetSha256s matching the referenced threshold calibration reports.
